nasb.text: Moses said to Korah, “You and all your company be present before the Lord tomorrow, both you and they along with Aaron.

esv.text: And Moses said to Korah, “Be present, you and all your company, before the Lord, you and they, and Aaron, tomorrow.

cnv.text: 摩西對可拉說：“明天你和你的同黨，以及亞倫，都要站在耶和華面前。

ccb.text: 摩西对可拉说：“明天你和你的同伙要跟亚伦一起站在耶和华面前。
